sources.title: Cover Me | Full Movie | Action Drama | Danny Trejo
sources.description:
*Cover Me* - A young wife, mother, and workaholic entrepreneur is faced with an eerie supernatural opportunity to reset her future when a strange encounter with an eccentric man gives her a second chance at saving her company, marriage, family, and very future.
2020.  Stars: Jules Willcox, Danny Trejo, Jesse Metcalfe

metadata.Plot: A policewoman goes undercover as a model for an erotic magazine to help catch a serial killer who is preying on erotic models and strippers. FMV game Blue Heat: The Case of the Cover Girl Murders (1997) is based on the movie.
metadata.Actors: Rick Rossovich, Courtney Taylor, Paul Sorvino
